title: Mysterious Structures
description: A very small data pack that adds rare bedrock dropping meteorites a new villager house and a floating island lab
body: A small datapack that currently adds rare metorites that may have one or two obtainable bedrock blocks, totem villager houses with early to midgame loot and gen labs on floating islands over the plains. The aim of this datapack is to add leight weight, vanila friendly structures. [To be noted: This is my first published data pack and I recomend running it in an test environment before adding it to your main world or server]. Feel free to contact me if you have any questions or ideas. You are free to use this data pack for your own or any other purposes. Discord: Facile_Priceps
